title: Arbitrum TVL Surpasses $3.2 Billion
description: The Arbitrum network has demonstrated impressive growth in total value locked (TVL), reaching $3.2 billion in December 2024. This represents a 40% increase over the past month, strengthening the Layer 2 solution's position as the leading Ethereum scaling network.
lead: Arbitrum reached $3.2 billion in TVL with 40% growth over the month
author: Editorial

The network has benefited significantly from the migration of several major protocols from Ethereum mainnet.

upgrade promises to expand the network's capabilities by allowing developers to build smart contracts in Rust and C++. This could attract a broader developer base and potentially drive additional TVL growth.

The sustained TVL growth on Arbitrum reflects broader trends in DeFi, where users increasingly favor cost efficiency and transaction speed. As institutional adoption continues, Layer 2 solutions are poised to capture a significant share of the expanding market.
